commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Vile, (ver. 14,) defiled, (sordid am). Hebrew chalala, "a profane woman "(Pagnin) or one of ill-fame; as captives, inn-keepers, are generally esteemed. Zone, means a common prostitute. (Josephus, iii. 3.) None of these fit matches for the priests.
